# Copilot instructions — cc-mods/.github (org profile)

This repo holds the **[cc-mods](https://github.com/cc-mods)** organization profile
(`profile/README.md`) shown on the org landing page.

📓 **Knowledge base:** **[`cc-mods/knowledge`](https://github.com/cc-mods/knowledge)** (private; org
members only) is the source of truth for the suite — architecture, per-repo findings, conventions.
Start with
[`suite-architecture.md`](https://github.com/cc-mods/knowledge/blob/main/suite-architecture.md).
When the suite changes, update both `profile/README.md` here and the relevant knowledge doc.

## Editing the profile

- Keep `profile/README.md` accurate: the repo table, the modularity principles, and the
  desktop/iOS install paths. Cross-link every suite repo.
- No game assets, personal data, or secrets.
